title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
snippet: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.

title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
snippet: Robinhood will let users create a separate account with pre-loaded balance that an agent use to trade
